en:
At twelve the human body is at its most vigorous, yet the likelihood of death is least at that age.
Later we undergo a progressive loss of vigour which finally becomes so steep that we can live no longer.
This decline with the passing of time is called ageing.
Most people assume ageing resembles the cooling of a hot kettle or the wearing-out of a pair of shoes.
Mechanical systems run out of energy, but a run-down watch can be rewound whereas an old watch cannot repair itself.
Between twelve and eighty we gradually lose the power to repair ourselves against serious illness.
An illness that would knock us over at twelve can knock us into our grave at eighty.
If we could stay as vigorous as we were at twelve, half of us would need about seven hundred years to die.
cn:
十二岁时人体最为强健，然该年龄死亡概率最低。
此后我们经历活力的逐渐丧失，终至无法继续存活。
这种随时间流逝的衰退称为衰老。
多数人以为衰老像热水壶变凉或鞋子磨穿。
机械系统会耗尽能量，但停摆的表可重上发条，老旧之表却无法自我修复。
十二至八十岁之间，我们逐渐失去对抗重病的能力。
十二岁时能击倒我们的疾病，到八十岁可将我们送入坟墓。
若保持十二岁时的活力，半数人需约七百年才会死去。

en:
Contamination of water supplies is usually due to poor sanitation near sources or sewage leaking into distribution systems.
Even safe piped water is not always safe by the time it reaches the tap.
Travellers on short trips should avoid untreated water and prefer hot drinks or well-known bottled brands.
Boiling is always a good way of treating water; ice is only as safe as the water from which it is made.
Alcohol should not be relied upon to sterilize water, and methylated spirits are very poisonous.
Carbonated drinks are acidic and slightly safer than still water from uncertain sources.
If no other safe supply is available, tap water too hot to touch can be left to cool and is generally safe.
Those planning trips to remote areas should learn the various methods for making water safe.
cn:
水源污染通常因近源卫生差或污水渗入供水系统所致。
即便源头安全的自来水，抵达龙头时未必仍安全。
短途旅行者应避免未经处理的水，宜选热饮或知名品牌瓶装饮料。
煮沸是可靠的消毒法；冰的安全性取决于制冰用水。
不可依赖酒精灭菌，变性酒精剧毒。
碳酸饮料呈酸性，比来源不明静水略为安全。
若无其他安全水源，烫手难触的自来水放凉后通常可饮。
计划前往偏远地区者应了解各种净水方法。

en:
Few writers know where they are going when they first set pen to paper.
In the breaking and remaking of drafts they discover meanings not consciously in their minds when they began.
Some read nothing but their own books and talk interminably about hidden meanings.
The temptation to write to please the reader can be a writer's undoing.
The talent goes into the first draft, and the art into the drafts that follow.
Like any artist, a writer has no resting place and no outside judgment that can replace the judgment from within.
A writer makes order out of the anarchy of his heart through ruthless discipline.
When he flirts with fame he is taking time off from living with himself.
cn:
作家初落笔时几乎无人清楚方向。
在打破与重组稿件的过程中，他们渐悟初未意识到的内涵。
有人只读自己的书，没完没了地谈论隐藏含义。
为取悦读者而写的诱惑可能是作家的祸根。
才华倾注于初稿，艺术成就于后续修改。
与其他艺术家一样，作家没有安身之所，外界评判无法替代内心判断。
作家以严苛自律将内心无序化为秩序。
当他追逐名声时，是在暂避与自我共处。

en:
Waves are the signatures of the struggle between ocean and atmosphere.
Although an ocean wave gives the impression of a wall of water moving toward you, the water stays about where it was.
If the water moved with the wave, everything on the ocean would race shoreward with catastrophic results.
A particle on the surface moves in a roughly circular orbit as the wave passes through deep water.
From maturity to death a wave obeys the same laws as any other living thing and is eventually reabsorbed.
Undulating waves are generated by wind, earth tremors, and the gravitational pull of the moon and sun.
Once waves have been generated, gravity drives them in an attempt to restore the ocean surface to a flat plain.
Waves convey the sun's message from the atmosphere to the sea in an ancient and powerful rhythm.
cn:
波浪是海洋与大气斗争的签名。
尽管海浪给人以水墙扑面而来的印象，水质点却大致留在原位。
若水体随浪整体推进，海上万物将灾难性地冲向海岸。
深海中水质点随波浪作近似圆周运动。
波浪从成熟到消亡服从与其他生命体相同的法则，终被重新吸收。
起伏波浪由风、地壳震颤及日月引力产生。
波浪生成后，重力驱使它们试图恢复海面平坦。
波浪以古老而有力的节奏将太阳的信息从大气传予大海。

en:
Two methods are used for training elephants: the tough and the gentle.
The tough method produces a resentful animal who may later turn man-killer.
The gentle method requires more patience but produces a cheerful elephant of loyal service.
The first essential is to assign a single mahout entirely responsible for the animal.
Elephants like to have one master and are capable of considerable personal affection.
Captive elephants between fifteen and twenty are most economical to capture for training.
A tame elephant may be tethered nearby to give a wild captive confidence before training begins.
When eating normally, the elephant's own training begins with soothing chants and endearing epithets.
cn:
驯象有强硬与温和两法。
强硬法养成愤恨的野兽，日后或袭击人类。
温和法需更多耐心，却得性情开朗、忠诚服役之象。
首要须指定单一象夫全权负责。
象喜单一主人，可生深厚情感。
十五至二十岁捕获的野象最经济。
训练前可拴驯象在旁以增野象信心。
进食正常后，方以抚慰吟唱与亲昵称呼开始训练。

en:
An earthquake comes without warning, so instruments that neither slumbered nor slept had to be invented.
Simple devices used rods that fell in different directions to record a shock's strength.
The ideal instrument would record ground movements with a pen on paper as the quake passed by.
Early seismometers kept the pen still while the paper moved beneath it—like writing by moving the paper, not the pen.
A weight on a string moves only slightly when the hand is shaken, so a pen attached to it would stay still.
As the paper moved under the pen point, the earthquake was recorded in ink upon the drum.
The first wave recorded is longitudinal; the second is transverse and arrives minutes later.
Instruments far from the centre show three waves arriving one after another through the earth and surface rocks.
cn:
地震悄然而至，须发明不眠不休的仪器。
简易装置以杆倾倒方向记录震动强度。
理想仪器应以笔尖在纸上记录地面运动。
早期地震仪固定笔尖、移动纸张——如移纸而书。
绳端重物在手摇动时几乎不动，附笔于其上则相对静止。
纸在笔尖下移动时，墨迹于鼓面记下地震。
首波为纵波；次波为横波，数分钟后抵达。
远离震中的仪器显示三波相继经地球与表面岩层抵达。

en:
Given a planet approximately like our own, life is almost certain to start.
Among our solar system's planets, only Earth can sustain life as we know it.
With so many stars in the universe, planets like ours make intelligent life a virtual certainty.
If aliens exist, why have we had no visitors? Perhaps they came long ago and found us uninteresting.
Radio waves travel at the speed of light; a message from our 1920s broadcasts is barely halfway to its destination.
Our chemical rockets have no chance of reaching the nearest star, four light years away.
There is a uniquely rational way to communicate: the 21-cm hydrogen frequency at 1420 megacycles.
Without that agreed frequency, searching for intelligent life would be like wandering London hoping for a chance encounter.
cn:
给定一颗与地球相近的行星，生命几乎必然萌生。
太阳系中仅地球可维持我们所知的生命。
宇宙恒星无数，类似行星使智慧生命几成必然。
若外星人存在，为何尚无访客？或许他们早已来访，视我们为无趣。
无线电波以光速传播；我们1920年代广播的信号尚在中途。
化学火箭无法抵达四光年外的最近恒星。
有唯一理性沟通方式：1420兆周的21厘米氢辐射频率。
若无此约定频率，搜寻智慧生命犹如在伦敦盲目碰运气。

en:
Custom plays a predominant role in experience and belief, yet we seldom study it as seriously as our own minds.
No man sees the world with pristine eyes; everything is filtered through traditional customs and institutions.
From the moment of birth, the customs into which a child is born shape his experience and behaviour.
By the time he is grown, a culture's habits are his habits and its impossibilities his impossibilities.
A child born on the opposite side of the globe can never achieve the thousandth part of another culture.
John Dewey compared custom's influence to the proportion of our mother tongue against baby talk.
Anthropology was impossible while people divided themselves from primitives, barbarians, and pagans.
We must study all institutions based on the same premises, our own among the rest.
cn:
习俗在经验与信仰中占主导，我们却少以研究心智的严肃态度研究它。
无人以未受影响的目光看世界；一切经传统习俗与制度过滤。
从出生那一刻起，所承习俗塑造儿童的经验与行为。
至成年，文化之习惯即其习惯，文化之不可能即其不可能。
地球另一端出生的孩子永远无法获得另一文化的千分之一。
杜威以母语词汇量对比儿语说明习俗影响之巨。
人们将己与野蛮人、异教徒对立时，人类学不可能。
须将基于相同前提的制度一并研究，己文化亦在其中。

en:
Competition with other creatures ended long ago; competition between persons and communities persists fiercely.
Our environment is no longer essentially physical but chiefly conditioned by the things we believe.
Morocco and California occupy similar latitudes yet differ wholly in development because of ideas in people's minds.
The most destructive effects of colonial invasion came not from weapons but from ideas.
Twenty or thirty pages of information handed to a major power in 1925 could have changed world history.
Ideas are dangerous: they could inject into the modern world thoughts that would utterly destroy us.
On a galactic timescale, human history is negligible, yet ideas within that brief span can overturn civilizations.
We cannot think far outside the patterns our culture has conditioned into our brains.
cn:
与其他物种的竞争早已结束；人与人、社群间的竞争依然激烈。
决定我们的环境已非本质上的物理环境，而主要为我们所信之物。
摩洛哥与加州纬度相近，因居民心中观念不同而发展迥异。
殖民入侵最具破坏性的影响来自观念，非武器。
1925年交给大国的二三十页信息本可改变历史。
观念危险：或可注入足以毁灭我们的思想。
在星系时间尺度上人类历史微不足道，然短暂岁月中的观念可倾覆文明。
我们难以跳出文化植入脑海的思维模式。

en:
Worry is a spasm of the emotion; the mind catches hold of something and will not let it go.
One can only gently insinuate another field of interest until the old grip relaxes and repair begins.
The cultivation of a hobby is a policy of first importance, but it cannot be improvised in a day.
To be happy and safe one ought to have two or three real hobbies, not merely say late in life that one will take an interest.
It is no use doing what you like; you have got to like what you do.
Fortune's favoured children are those whose work and pleasure are one.
Those whose work is their pleasure most need the means of banishing it from their minds at intervals.
Human beings may be divided into those toiled to death, worried to death, or bored to death.
cn:
忧虑是情绪痉挛，心灵抓住某物不放。
只能温和引入另一兴趣，旧握力渐松，恢复始。
培养爱好至关重要，却不可一日速成。
须有两三种真正爱好，而非晚年方说要产生兴趣。
做你喜欢的事无用；须喜欢你所做之事。
命运宠儿是工作与乐趣合一之人。
工作即乐趣者最需间歇将工作逐出脑海。
人分劳死、愁死、闷死三类。

en:
Economy motivates camping, but it is far from being the only or greatest motive.
Camping releases the affluent traveller from fears of tipping doormen and dealing with hotel hierarchies.
Car ownership gives a sense of freedom that camping refines: from one's door to hills or sands and back again.
If the beach proves too crowded, the means of escape are outside—or part of—the tent.
Idealists claim camping denies contact with local people, but popular Continental sites are highly cosmopolitan.
Notices appear in French, Italian, Spanish, English, German and Dutch beside the same water points.
At meal times the odour of sauerkraut vies with that of garlic at cosmopolitan camp tables.
Whether organized camping will destroy independent camping depends chiefly on whether campers alienate countryside owners.
cn:
经济是露营动机之一，却远非唯一或最大。
露营将富裕旅人从门童小费与酒店阶层的恐惧中解放。
汽车所有权带来独立感，露营将之精炼：从家门至山海再返回。
海滩过挤时，帐篷外即是退路。
理想主义者称露营隔绝当地人，但大陆热门营地高度国际化。
同一取水点旁告示有法、意、西、英、德、荷等语。
餐时泡菜香与蒜香在国际化营地餐桌上交织。
组织化露营会否扼杀独立露营，主要取决于露营者是否疏远乡野地主。

en:
There is no shortage of tipsters offering get-rich-quick schemes, but serious investors need a proper portfolio.
Ask five reputable stock brokers and you may receive five different answers even with full personal details.
There is no one right way to structure a portfolio, though sinking everything into one risky venture is certainly wrong.
Older investors prioritise preserving capital and generating extra income through gilts and conservative shares.
Younger investors with a sanguine disposition may include growth stocks alongside pedestrian investments.
The golden rule is to spread your risk across assets that behave differently.
Leave the Las Vegas mentality to those with money to fritter.
Patient diversification, not gambling, is how lasting financial security is usually built.
cn:
一夜暴富贴士者比比皆是，严肃投资者却需正规投资组合。
咨询五位信誉经纪商，即便详述个人情况或得五种答案。
配置无唯一正确方式，但全押单一高风险项目肯定错误。
年长投资者优先保值与获取收益，宜持国债与稳健股。
心态乐观的年轻投资者可在平庸投资旁配置成长股。
黄金法则：把风险分散到表现各异的资产上。
把拉斯维加斯心态留给挥霍者。
持久的财务安全通常靠耐心分散投资，而非赌博。
